elements.label: GM Roll Config
elements.description: The settings the Storyteller configures before making a resonance roll. Temperament settings (dice count, highest/lowest, thresholds) and resonance weights (per-type likelihood sliders). Ephemeral — resets on app restart.

elements.label: Dice Engine
elements.description: The random number generation backend. Takes a GM Roll Config and produces raw roll results. Handles temperament rolls (d10 pool, advantage/disadvantage), weighted resonance type picks, and acute checks (9–10 on a d10).

elements.label: Resonance Roll Result
elements.description: The complete outcome of a single resonance roll. Carries all temperament dice, the selected die, temperament tier, resonance type, acute check, and an optional attached dyscrasia. The main product of the Resonance Roller that flows outward to exports, Roll20, and the event bus.

elements.label: Dyscrasia Store
elements.description: SQLite database table holding all dyscrasia entries — built-in V5 sourcebook entries (re-seeded on every startup) and user-created custom entries. Each entry has a resonance type, name, description, bonus, and custom flag.

elements.label: Roll20 Live Feed
elements.description: Live character data streaming from a Roll20 game session via the browser extension. Carries character ID, name, controlled-by, and all sheet attributes. Data arrives as debounced whole-character snapshots (200ms batching of per-attribute Firebase events).

elements.label: Roll20 Writeback
elements.description: Data pushed from the desktop app back into Roll20 character sheets. Supports three operations: Set Attribute (write a single value), Send Chat (inject a chat message), and Refresh (request fresh character snapshots).

elements.label: Markdown Export
elements.description: Resonance roll results saved as timestamped Markdown files to ~/Documents/vtmtools/. Each file contains the full roll result, any attached dyscrasia, and an export timestamp.

elements.label: Tool Event Bus
elements.description: Svelte store that lets tools broadcast events to each other without direct coupling. Currently carries resonance_result events (temperament, resonance type, acute status, dyscrasia name). Designed as the decoupling layer for future cross-tool features.

elements.label: Tauri Event Bridge
elements.description: Event channel carrying real-time updates from the Rust backend to the Svelte frontend using Tauri's built-in event system. Emits roll20://connected, roll20://disconnected, and roll20://characters-updated events. Distinct from the Tool Event Bus — this is backend-to-frontend, not tool-to-tool.

elements.label: WebSocket Bridge
elements.description: Local WebSocket server on 127.0.0.1:7423 that connects the Tauri desktop app to the Chrome extension running inside Roll20. Accepts one connection at a time. Carries both inbound (Live Feed) and outbound (Writeback) traffic.

elements.label: Resonance Roller
elements.description: The main resonance rolling tool. Consumes GM Roll Config, drives the Dice Engine, displays results, and distributes them to exports, Roll20, and the event bus. Also queries the Dyscrasia Store on Acute results.

elements.label: Dyscrasia Manager
elements.description: Full CRUD interface for browsing, searching, filtering, adding, editing, and deleting dyscrasias. Also supports rolling a random dyscrasia by resonance type.

elements.label: Campaign Viewer
elements.description: Live Roll20 character stat display. Shows hunger, health, willpower, humanity, and blood potency for all connected characters in real time.

elements.label: Roll20 Game Session
elements.description: The Roll20 browser-based virtual tabletop where the actual VTM game is played. Source of all live character data. The browser extension runs inside this page.

elements.label: Browser Extension
elements.description: Chrome extension injected into Roll20 pages. Reads character data from Roll20's Backbone/Firebase data layer, debounces attribute changes, and relays snapshots to the desktop app. Also receives writeback commands.

elements.label: Storyteller
elements.description: The GM / Storyteller using the desktop app. Configures roll settings, triggers rolls, manages dyscrasias, and monitors the coterie via the Campaign viewer.

elements.label: Roll History
elements.description: In-memory list of past resonance roll results for the current session. Displayed in the Resonance Roller UI. Resets when the app restarts.
